title.rendered: Remote BIOS Firmware Management Solution for Data Centers

content.rendered:
AMI, Inc. (AMI) has developed a Remote BIOS Firmware Management Solution that allows data center administrators to remotely update BIOS settings for many identical servers all at once. With AMI’s Remote BIOS solution, data center administrators no longer need to manually configure each and every computer in the data centers; it can easily be done remotely with just one system!

Watch our video on YouTube to get more information about the remote BIOS solution and how it works to assist data center administrators in streamlining the BIOS update and/or configuration change process here: https://youtu.be/faha1YOsppY.

To learn more about this technology, please contact your AMI Representative at 1-800-828-9264, or visit ami.com/products/aptio-v/.
